changelog: Security: upgraded axios → 1.15.x (15 CVEs incl. SSRF, prototype pollution, header injection)
Security: upgraded bcrypt → 6, sqlite3 → 6, nodemailer → 8 to clear high-severity CVEs
Security: database-backup endpoints now require admin (closed privilege-escalation via crafted SQL dump upload)
Security: stop returning JWT in login response body — token lives only in HttpOnly cookie
Security: sanitize \r\n in .env writes to prevent JWT_SECRET overwrite via Settings
Security: GET /api/users and PUT /api/client-settings/:id now require admin
Fix: server-pushed backup paths now actually populate client (use=1→use=2 bitmask)
Add: warning banner + disabled file-backup buttons when client has no backup paths
